character_description: The person has shoulder-length, wavy dark hair with a side part. Their skin tone is warm beige with a subtle natural glow. They are wearing a burnt orange top and a white cardigan over it. No glasses or visible accessories are present. The individual has a friendly smile and a medium build. No objects are held in either hand or visible in the image. The person is dressed in professional office clothes with a non-sexual character design.
